variants: Junella Arsenault specializes in Gerontology, focusing her research on the aging process and its implications on well-being. Her academic journey was guided by her mentor and doctoral advisor, Kiana Avila, who played a pivotal role in her development as a scholar. Junella is a recipient of significant funding from the Atlas Prospect Trust, which has supported her groundbreaking work. Her findings and insights have been published in the Pewter Lantern Imprint, contributing to the field's knowledge base. In addition to her research, she holds an Alluvial Potionist License, which certifies her expertise in the intersection of wellness and gerontological practices.
